_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification
AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Cell Biology
topics.description: Topic 1: Cell biology — cells, microscopy, cell division, stem cells, transport in cells

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Organisation
topics.description: Topic 2: Organisation — cell organisation, digestive system, heart and blood vessels, health and disease, plant organisation

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Infection and Response
topics.description: Topic 3: Infection and response — communicable diseases, monoclonal antibodies, vaccines and medicines

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Bioenergetics
topics.description: Topic 4: Bioenergetics — photosynthesis, respiration

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Homeostasis and Response
topics.description: Topic 5: Homeostasis and response — nervous system, hormonal coordination, maintaining internal environments

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Inheritance, Variation and Evolution
topics.description: Topic 6: Inheritance, variation and evolution — reproduction, genetics, natural selection and genetic modification

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Ecology
topics.description: Topic 7: Ecology — ecosystems, cycles in nature, biodiversity and the effect of human activities

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Atomic Structure and the Periodic Table
topics.description: Topic 8: Atomic structure and the periodic table — atoms, elements, compounds, the periodic table, properties of metals and non-metals

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Bonding, Structure, and the Properties of Matter
topics.description: Topic 9: Bonding, structure, and the properties of matter — chemical bonds, ionic, covalent and metallic compounds, bulk and surface properties

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Quantitative Chemistry
topics.description: Topic 10: Quantitative chemistry — relative atomic mass, moles, concentration, yield and atom economy

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Chemical Changes
topics.description: Topic 11: Chemical changes — reactivity series, extraction of metals, electrolysis, acid-base chemistry

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Energy Changes
topics.description: Topic 12: Energy changes — exothermic and endothermic reactions, reaction profiles, bond energies

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: The Rate and Extent of Chemical Change
topics.description: Topic 13: The rate and extent of chemical change — rates of reaction, reversible reactions and equilibrium

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Organic Chemistry
topics.description: Topic 14: Organic chemistry — hydrocarbons, fractional distillation, combustion, polymers, alcohols and carboxylic acids

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Chemical Analysis
topics.description: Topic 15: Chemical analysis — pure substances and mixtures, chromatography, tests for common gases and ions

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Chemistry of the Atmosphere
topics.description: Topic 16: Chemistry of the atmosphere — Earth's early atmosphere, greenhouse gases, climate change, carbon footprint

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Using Resources
topics.description: Topic 17: Using resources — finite and renewable resources, water treatment, life cycle assessment, recycling

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Energy
topics.description: Topic 18: Energy — energy stores and transfers, energy efficiency, national and global energy resources

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Electricity
topics.description: Topic 19: Electricity — circuit diagrams, current, resistance, potential difference, series and parallel circuits, mains electricity

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Particle Model of Matter
topics.description: Topic 20: Particle model of matter — states of matter, changes of state, internal energy, particle model and pressure

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Atomic Structure
topics.description: Topic 21: Atomic structure — atoms and isotopes, radioactive decay, nuclear radiation, fission and fusion

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Forces
topics.description: Topic 22: Forces — scalar and vector quantities, contact and non-contact forces, gravity, forces and motion, momentum

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Waves
topics.description: Topic 23: Waves — transverse and longitudinal waves, properties of waves, reflection, refraction, sound, electromagnetic waves

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

topics.title: Magnetism and Electromagnetism
topics.description: Topic 24: Magnetism and electromagnetism — permanent and induced magnets, magnetic fields, the motor effect, electromagnetic induction

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

objectives.title: AO1

objectives.title: AO2
objectives.description: Apply knowledge and understanding of: scientific ideas; scientific enquiry, techniques and procedures.

_meta.sourceDocument: AQA GCSE Combined Science: Trilogy (8464) Specification

objectives.title: AO3
objectives.description: Analyse information and ideas to: interpret and evaluate; make judgments and draw conclusions; develop and improve experimental procedures.
